scripts.dev: concurrently -k "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:request" "pnpm dev:volunteer" "pnpm dev:notification" "pnpm dev:web"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @relieflink/auth-service build && pnpm --filter @relieflink/request-service build && pnpm --filter @relieflink/volunteer-service build && pnpm --filter @relieflink/notification-service build && pnpm --filter @relieflink/web build
